Thanks for opening a PR! A few quick checks help reviewers move fast.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what changes and why. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- "Closes #123" / "Refs #456" / "n/a" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / milestone
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behavior change)
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## How tested

<!--
Concrete steps you ran. e.g.:
- `npm run lint && npm run typecheck` clean
- Tested on web (Chrome, https://localhost:3000) — created a note offline,
  came back online, mutation drained.
- Tested on iOS Capacitor build — sign-in + magic link callback works.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] Lint + typecheck pass locally (`npm run lint && npm run typecheck`).
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or surface changed.
- [ ] Naming follows the platform/artifact axis (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#naming-conventions)).
- [ ] No new dependencies added without justification.
- [ ] No secrets, internal URLs, or non-placeholder identifiers committed.
